meaning: n.棋盘上的小方格,,棋子,检验员,<美>(帽子,行李等)寄存者
examples: Run the Spell and Grammar checker.
Use a spell checker if you need to.
Always run the spell and grammar checker before editing a text.
The checker beamed, commenting that the stock price had reached a record high the day before.
Dave grew up in a working-class family and paid his way through college as a grocery checker.
